---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is.
Example: "I'm frustrated when idle StatefulSets aren't detected..."

## Describe the Solution You'd Like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe Alternatives You've Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe the real-world use case for this feature:
- What environment are you running? (shared cluster, Kubeflow, dev environment, etc.)
- How many namespaces/pods are involved?
- What workload types? (Deployments, StatefulSets, Jobs, etc.)

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references about the feature request here.
